products_lead: Blendy offers multiple styles to match your lifestyle—from instant convenience to café-like richness.
product_1_desc: A classic option for people who want coffee fast, without losing aroma and richness.
product_1_point_3: Easy to enjoy at home or office
product_2_desc: Designed for convenience and variety. Perfect for busy mornings and easy breaks.
product_3_desc: For those who want deeper aroma and a more café-like experience at home.
product_3_point_3: Pairs well with desserts and meals
